summary: Large matching/decomp PR for the menu diagram files, primarily touching src/melee/mn/mndiagram.c plus mndiagram2/3 source and static headers. Evidence shows a new match for mnDiagram_PopupAnimProc, major score improvements in mnDiagram_InputProc and fn_802461BC, typed overlays for menu diagram data tables, assert macro cleanup, allocation/assert additions, and extensive cursor/input/detail-view control-flow reconstruction. The bot report also records one broken match and several unmatched-item regressions.

key_files.role: Main diagram source; adds debug include, mnDiagram_AnimTable overlay, matching changes for sort helpers, large mnDiagram_InputProc reconstruction, popup/cursor/create code changes, PAD_STACK adjustments, and HSD_ASSERTREPORT allocation checks.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: added mnDiagram_AnimTable overlay over mnDiagram_803EE728
diff.diff: mnDiagram_8023FA6C PAD_STACK(16), fighter_kos[(u8) j], unlocked tie-break change
diff.diff: mnDiagram_InputProc expanded with sorted_fighters, u32 input, cursor/search gotos and selection clamping
text_corpus.jsonl bot report: mnDiagram_PopupAnimProc new 100% match; mnDiagram_InputProc 22.71% to 89.53%

key_files.role: Detail/stat row source; replaces raw __assert blocks with HSD_ASSERT/HSD_ASSERTREPORT, uses typed/static-table references, adjusts allocation/user-data setup and scroll-arrow table access.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: byte-offset casts replaced with &mnDiagram2_803EEAD0[0xC] and [0x18]
diff.diff: mnDiagram2_Create adds HSD_ASSERTREPORT(0x3E6, user_data, "Can't get user_data.\n")
text_corpus.jsonl bot report: mnDiagram2_CreateStatRow regression 87.33% to 80.11%; mnDiagram2_UpdateScrollArrows regression 98.40% to 97.39%

key_files.role: Static declarations updated for mndiagram2 data shape; AnimLoopSettings symbol changed from scalar to two-element array and assert string externs removed.

diff.diff: removed mnDiagram2_804D4FC0 and mnDiagram2_804D4FC8 char externs

diff.diff: mnDiagram3_80245BA4 uses HSD_JObjGetTranslationY and typed mnDiagram3_803EEC28.xC/x18
diff.diff: mnDiagram3_80247008 allocates Diagram3 and HSD_ASSERTREPORT(0x3FC, user_data, "Can't get user_data.\n")

text_corpus.jsonl bot report: fn_802461BC 0.00% to 85.31%; mnDiagram3_80247008 broken match 100.00% to 97.22%

key_files.role: Static declarations updated for typed mndiagram3 position/stat data tables and removed assert string externs.

what_changed.text: Converted several raw byte/static data areas into typed table declarations or local overlay structs, including mnDiagram_AnimTable, mnDiagram3_PosTable, mnDiagram3_StatTable, and mnDiagram2_803EEB60 as an AnimLoopSettings array.
Expanded and reshaped mndiagram input/navigation logic for fighter/name cursor handling, hovered_selection clamping, unlock/name filtering, and popup selection routing.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl bot report: mnDiagram_InputProc +2098 bytes, 22.71% to 89.53%

what_changed.text: Added or improved allocation checks with HSD_ASSERTREPORT in mndiagram, mndiagram2, and mndiagram3 create/popup paths.
Replaced some raw __assert uses and assert-string extern dependencies with HSD_ASSERT/HSD_ASSERTREPORT and removed related static-header string externs.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: mndiagram2.static.h removed assert string externs
diff.diff: mndiagram3.static.h removed assert string externs

what_changed.text: Implemented or substantially reconstructed fn_802461BC in mndiagram3 for detail-view input, scrolling, popup cleanup, and text refresh behavior.

smart_moves.text: Introduced typed overlays for data accessed at known offsets, improving readability over repeated raw base+offset casts.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: comment on mnDiagram_AnimTable overlay over mnDiagram_803EE728

smart_moves.text: Kept score-relevant narrow changes visible through bot output, including the exact new matched function and named regressions.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl bot report: one new match, one broken match, 15 improvements, 6 regressions

smart_moves.text: Converted generated-looking assert-string globals into project assert macros where file/line evidence was present in the diff.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: __assert calls in mndiagram2/mndiagram3 replaced by HSD_ASSERT or HSD_ASSERTREPORT

decomp_lessons.lesson: For menu diagram data blocks, a small typed overlay or table struct can make fixed-offset animation, position, and stat data accesses reviewable while still preserving address-based static declarations.
When replacing raw assert expansions, remove now-unused assert string extern declarations from the static header if the source no longer references those symbols.

A PR can improve a target function substantially while still breaking an existing match or regressing neighboring unmatched items; intake should record the bot ledger rather than infer clean validation.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl bot report: mnDiagram_PopupAnimProc new match
text_corpus.jsonl bot report: mnDiagram3_80247008 broken match
text_corpus.jsonl bot report: 6 regressions in unmatched items

naming_conventions.name: mnDiagram_AnimTable
naming_conventions.observed_pattern: Subsystem prefix plus semantic role; fields retain offset-style names such as x40/x58/x64 where meaning is not fully recovered.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: typedef struct mnDiagram_AnimTable with x40, x58, x64, x70, x88, x94

naming_conventions.name: mnDiagram3_PosTable and mnDiagram3_StatTable
naming_conventions.observed_pattern: Subsystem prefix plus table role; known array role named indices, unknown regions kept offset-style x50/x78.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: mndiagram3.static.h added mnDiagram3_PosTable and mnDiagram3_StatTable

naming_conventions.name: local cursor variables
naming_conventions.observed_pattern: Short role names such as sorted, count, steps, col, row, cur, found, ptr, and ptr2 were used in reconstructed input loops.

naming_conventions.name: goto labels in input reconstruction
naming_conventions.observed_pattern: Labels encode mode/direction/search stage, e.g. nc_outer, nr_inner, up_n, dn_n_find, rt_n_inner, up_f.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK tuning remained in several functions, including changing PAD_STACK(8) to PAD_STACK(16) in mnDiagram_8023FA6C and formatting PAD_STACK(0x18).
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Needs narrow objdiff evidence before treating as stable style; bot report shows mixed regressions.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used typed table references and address-preserving arrays instead of repeated raw base pointer casts for static data.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Low when backed by symbol size/offset evidence, but the slice does not include independent section metadata.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Reconstructed some input traversal with explicit gotos and pointer increments to match generated branch shape.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Readable natural loops may be preferable if they verify; PR evidence only shows the chosen shape and bot score, not failed loop attempts.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Added local fake HSD_JObjSetTranslateX/Y/Z helpers with #define __FILE__ "jobj.h" and HSD_ASSERT line numbers 932/947/962.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Conflicts with the loaded header-inlines standard's caution against copying or manually expanding header helper bodies in TUs; route for curator/source review rather than promoting as a tactic.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs touching HSD_JObjSetTranslateX_Fake or #define __FILE__ "jobj.h" in src/melee/mn to see whether the local fake helpers were removed or canonicalized.
Search later mndiagram PRs for mnDiagram3_80247008 to see whether the broken match reported by the bot was repaired.
Search mndiagram2 CreateStatRow and UpdateScrollArrows history for recovery after the bot-reported regressions.
Search for typed table patterns mnDiagram3_PosTable, mnDiagram3_StatTable, and mnDiagram_AnimTable to determine if these overlays became stable source style.

The raw diff in loaded_files is truncated, but targeted local grep provided additional excerpts for mndiagram2/mndiagram3 and static headers.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Typed overlays for fixed-offset menu diagram data
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2535 shows mndiagram progress by replacing raw byte-table casts with typed overlays/tables such as mnDiagram_AnimTable, mnDiagram3_PosTable, mnDiagram3_StatTable, and AnimLoopSettings arrays. Candidate lesson: when symbol size/offset evidence supports it, typed table overlays can improve reviewability over repeated base+offset casts.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Record mixed score ledgers, not only new matches
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2535 had a new 100% match for mnDiagram_PopupAnimProc and major unmatched-item improvements, but the bot also reported a broken mnDiagram3_80247008 match and six regressions. Candidate lesson: PR postmortems should preserve both progress and regressions when matching evidence is mixed.

source_update_candidates.title: Clarify handling of local fake header inline helpers
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2535 added local HSD_JObjSetTranslateX/Y/Z_Fake helpers with #define __FILE__ "jobj.h" and header assert line numbers. This appears risky under the existing header-inlines standard. Curator should consider whether standards need an explicit note that such local fake helper copies should be treated as temporary matching tactics requiring objdiff evidence and later API-layer cleanup.
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR evidence shows the tactic was used, but loaded standards already caution against manual header helper expansion; this should be curated as a warning/clarification, not accepted style.

source_update_candidates.title: mndiagram static headers own typed menu diagram data declarations
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2535 updated mndiagram2.static.h and mndiagram3.static.h to declare typed/static menu diagram data shapes, including mnDiagram2_803EEB60 as AnimLoopSettings[2], mnDiagram3_803EEC28 as mnDiagram3_PosTable, and mnDiagram3_803EEC4C as mnDiagram3_StatTable.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path fact about where typed data declarations live; should be verified against current source before promotion.

rejection_notes.text: Do not promote the local HSD_JObjSetTranslateX/Y/Z_Fake helpers as accepted decomp style from this PR alone; they conflict with loaded header-inline guidance and lack independent objdiff rationale in the slice.
Do not claim the PR was regression-free. The bot report explicitly lists a broken match and six regressions in unmatched items.
Do not infer human reviewer approval rationale; there are no loaded review comments or reviews.
